title: palicourea costularia
intro: Palicourea costularia, also known as the "Yellow Cordia", is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Palicourea costularia include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or used in combination with other plants to create a medicinal infusion.
